name: @openclaw/social-pipeline
description: End-to-end social media content pipeline: generate, humanize, enhance with marketing psychology, produce media, schedule via Postiz, and track analytics.
author: Sean Tunley <sean@tunley.co.za>

create-campaign.description: Create a new social media campaign with target platforms and goals.

generate-drafts.description: Generate content draft variants for a campaign across target platforms.

humanize-content.description: Run the humanizer pass to remove AI writing patterns from drafts.

apply-psychology.description: Enhance drafts with marketing psychology principles and mental models.

generate-media.description: Generate images or video assets for social media drafts.

submit-for-approval.description: Submit finalized drafts for human review and approval.

publish-content.description: Publish approved content to platforms via Postiz CLI or API.

sync-analytics.description: Pull analytics snapshots from Postiz for published content.

list-campaigns.description: List campaigns with optional filters for status, platform, and date range.

get-run-status.description: Get detailed status of a pipeline run including all stages.

inbox-status.description: Check if the Postiz social inbox is available.

inbox-list.description: List inbox notifications — mentions, comments, likes, shares from all connected platforms.

inbox-post-comments.description: Get all comments for a specific post.

inbox-reply.description: Reply to a comment or post on any connected platform via Postiz.

inbox-react.description: Like or react to a post or comment on any connected platform.

research-list.description: List research findings from pipeline runs with optional filters.

research-get.description: Get full details of a research finding including sources and data.

research-save.description: Save a research finding to the library for later use.

research-update-status.description: Approve, reject, or archive a research finding.

research-promote.description: Promote a research finding to a new content run.

seo-geo-score.description: Score a social post for AI search citation readiness (GEO) and E-E-A-T authority.

seo-geo-enhance.description: Enhance a social post for AI search citation and content authority signals.

seo-geo-generate.description: Generate a new social post fully optimized for GEO and E-E-A-T from scratch.

learning-list.description: List content learnings — patterns from edits, rejections, and analytics.

learning-get-applicable.description: Get applicable learnings for a platform, ready to inject into content prompts.

learning-extract-from-edit.description: Extract learnings by comparing original draft vs operator-edited version.

learning-extract-from-feedback.description: Extract learnings from rejection notes or revision request feedback.

learning-add-rule.description: Add an explicit content rule (100% confidence, never decays).

humanizer.description: AI pattern detection and rewriting skill for natural-sounding content.

marketing-psychology.description: Apply 70+ marketing psychology mental models to content.

content-learning.description: Automatically learns from post edits, approval feedback, and analytics to improve future content.

social-seo-geo.description: Optimize social posts for AI search citation (GEO) and content authority (E-E-A-T).

full-pipeline.description: Complete content pipeline: generate → humanize → psychology → media → approve → publish.

quick-post.description: Streamlined single-post flow skipping approval for pre-approved templates.

analytics-sync.description: Scheduled analytics pull and nightly summary generation.
